summary.summary: Bump APP_DEV_VERSION in Config.xcconfig from 0.8.4.23 to 0.8.4.24 (see diff:82ec1d771896; file:8f9475def3ac; commit:73cc5617c632).
summary.userFacingImpact: This change updates a development/build version identifier (APP_DEV_VERSION) in configuration metadata; there is no evidence in the provided sources that this modifies app behavior or runtime functionality. If confirmation is required about release labeling or CI/release pipeline effects, human review is recommended (see diff:82ec1d771896; commit:73cc5617c632).
